summary: Completed comprehensive backend API and frontend UI testing for Voice Assistant app. All core features working correctly.

minor.issue: Returns 520 instead of 404 for non-existent reminder ID (intermittent)

issues: shadow* style props deprecated warning - should migrate to boxShadow
expo-av deprecation warning - should migrate to expo-audio/expo-video

action_items: Minor: Consider handling 404 properly for non-existent reminder deletion (currently returns 520 intermittently)
Minor: Update deprecated shadow* styles to boxShadow in stylesheets
Future: Migrate from expo-av to expo-audio/expo-video before SDK 54
critical_code_review_comments: Phone numbers with + prefix are correctly preserved in both API and UI
Bulk selection feature working correctly with Select/Cancel/Select All/Delete buttons
Action buttons (CALL, SMS, WA) properly displayed in category detail views
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up TEST_* prefixed reminders during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend API tests located at /app/backend/tests/test_reminders_api.py. All CRUD operations for reminders work correctly. Phone numbers with + prefix preserved. UI tested on web version - expo-contacts doesn't work on web so manual entry mode is used.

dashboard.details: Quick Actions (6 icons: Meet, Call, SMS, WhatsApp, Deskwork, Notes), View All Reminders (5 categories: Meet, Call, SMS, WhatsApp, Deskwork - no Notes as expected), Social Media Hub (6 apps) all rendering correctly

reminder_crud.details: Create, Read, Delete operations working. Complete/mark-done also working.

category_detail_view.details: Opens correctly, shows reminders with action buttons (CALL, SMS, WA based on type)

bulk_selection.details: Select checkbox toggles bulk mode. Select All, Cancel, Delete(count) buttons appear correctly. Checkboxes shown next to each reminder card.

phone_plus_prefix.details: Phone numbers with + prefix (e.g., +919876543210) are preserved in API responses and displayed correctly in UI

action_screen.details: Action screen loads with Save button, contact fields (manual entry on web), voice input buttons, notes field. Save creates reminder successfully.
